security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:*; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:
